name: Wu Kong
bio:
Sun Wukong from ancient legends, who pursued freedom and strength throughout his life. He once challenged the Heavenly Court multiple times; after going through hardships, he became a legendary warrior in the Spirit Heroes Faction.

Role: Physical AOE
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero whose Ultimate can deal devastating damage to enemy groups; has certain Control Immunity ability.

skillSlots.name: Heaven-Earth Strike
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy column with the lowest-HP target twice (70% then 140% P.DMG); if only hitting one target, deals 70% extra True DMG.

skillSlots.name: Havoc in Heaven
skillSlots.description: Consumes all [Life-Saving Hair] to summon 9 + consumed stacks of clones attacking all enemies randomly (120% DMG per clone, prioritizes different targets; repeated hits on same target deal 25% DMG).

effects.name: Monkey King
effects.description: 40% probability for Sun Wukong to gain 1 stack of [Life-Saving Hair] when enemies act (max 15 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Monkey King
effects.description: When taking DMG exceeding 20% Max HP, consumes 1 stack of [Life-Saving Hair] to summon 1 clone attacking random enemy for 120% P.DMG with 30% Lifesteal (max 2 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Monkey King
effects.description: Probability to gain [Life-Saving Hair] when enemies act increased to 80%.

effects.name: Monkey King
effects.description: Gains 20% Ultimate DMG Bonus at 9 [Life-Saving Hair] stacks (removed after use).

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: When under Control, may consume 1 stack of [Life-Saving Hair] to block the Control (max 1 trigger per turn).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: Starts Battle with 4 stacks of [Life-Saving Hair].

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: After casting [Cosmic Strike], consumes 1 stack of [Life-Saving Hair] to Summon 2 Clones attacking random enemies for 120% P.DMG with 30% Crit, then refunds cooldown.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Sun Wukong gains 2 stacks of [Life-Saving Hair] when enemies fall (4 if killed by Sun Wukong).

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: At 4 stacks of [Life-Saving Hair], gaining additional stacks immediately releases [Havoc in Heaven] (20% DMG increase, refunds 3 stacks; max 1 trigger per turn, ignores Control).
